name: backend-code-review
tagline: Backend Python API code review skill (api/ dir) applying a security/performance/quality checklist and strict markdown output template.
verdict: Well-scoped review skill: clear triggers, explicit negative scope (no frontend), and a rigorously defined output contract. Weak spots: no failure-path guidance if referenced checklist files are unavailable or the diff is empty, and no versioning/changelog to track updates.

highlights.summary: No guidance for missing/empty diff, unmatched checklist beyond generic fallback, or unreadable files (line 27).
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill (line 1).
